_comment: Industry stats shown on the 'Why This Matters' page of the Cyber Security Assessment (Executive Summary Deck). Update quarterly/semi-annually/annually as the source reports refresh. Order is preserved on the page (left-to-right, top-to-bottom in a 3-column grid).

stats.label: average cost of a SA data breach in 2025
stats.description: A business-ending event for most SMEs.
stats.source: IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report 2025 — South Africa

stats.label: average time to identify and contain a breach
stats.description: Attackers may have access for nearly 8 months.
stats.source: IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report 2025

stats.label: of organisations fully recover from a breach
stats.description: Of those, 76% take more than 100 days.
stats.source: Sophos State of Ransomware South Africa 2025

stats.label: of SMBs with severe data loss shut within 6 months
stats.description: A single event can be existential.
stats.source: Industry composite — US CISA / various SMB cyber-resilience studies

stats.label: of breached organisations face operational disruption
stats.description: Staff cannot work; obligations go unmet.
stats.source: Sophos State of Ransomware South Africa 2025

stats.label: average downtime following a ransomware attack
stats.description: Nearly a month of halted operations.
stats.source: Sophos State of Ransomware South Africa 2025

ibm.name: IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report
